meaning: n.[植]欧亚甘草,由欧亚甘草根熬成的精
examples: They all have different kinds of flavors–cola, cherry, licorice and black currant.
Licorice and mung bean do detox well, especially the mung bean, which is used to purge toxins in liver.
The Jelly Belly was created in Los Angeles with just eight flavors: cherry, lemon, cream soda, tangerine, green apple, root beer, grape and licorice.
Common choices are orange or lemon peels, cardamom pods, coriander, licorice and so on.
No flavor flirts with the intellect and flatters as many taste receptors on the human tongue as licorice.
